training_status: very active (14 years consistent gym training, mountain biking, boxing)

benefits.description: Improved sleep from HGH aids in weight and fat loss
Maintained visible abdominal definition despite GH water retention

side_effects.description: Initial water retention from HGH but resolved within short period. Reports being very sensitive to water retention from multiple compounds.

protocol_notes: Age 50+, very disciplined training and diet (14 years). Pre-made non-processed high quality meals, no added sugar Sun-Thu, cheat day Sat, no fast food or soda in 10 years, extensive daily water intake. Mountain biking and boxing for cardio. Reports being sensitive to water retention from creatine (tried 6-7 different times, went away in 3 days off).
